summary: A Go-based monolithic orchestration tool utilizing MCP and AI agents, currently heavily focused on automated test generation and session metadata management.
concerns: Proliferation of auto-generated or agent-managed test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) polluting the repository structure
High volume of metadata and session management commits (chore: auto-commit, archive session) cluttering git history
Uncommitted modified files in the working tree during active development
Potential redundancy between baseline tests and agent-generated extra tests
suggestions: Clean up or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to prevent repository bloat
Implement .gitignore rules or a separate artifact store for ephemeral agent session metadata
Consolidate overlapping test suites to reduce maintenance burden
Ensure the unstaged modified file is committed or stashed appropriately
